name: Li-Cycle Holdings Corp. Common Shares
summary: Li-Cycle Holdings Corp. is a lithium-ion battery resource recovery company that utilizes its Spoke & Hub Technologies to recycle all types of lithium-ion batteries. The company recovers valuable materials such as lithium, nickel, and cobalt, which are then remanufactured into battery-grade materials for reuse in new batteries. Li-Cycle Holdings Corp. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
